# 2026-04-19 — Orbis Daily Log

## 03:25 UTC — Session Start
- Lead connected via Telegram direct
- Ecosystem: 34 agents, v4-ecosystem-review repo
- DTLX BE/FE: last known running ports 5555/3000 (need verification)

## 03:28 UTC — New Project Kickoff: AHV Tech Knowledge Hub

### Requirements (from Lead)
Build a blog sharing IT/CS knowledge (CTDL & GT, AI, etc.) + music relaxation + live study room.
- Must be beautiful and modern
- Quality, well-structured content
- Proper SEO

### OpenSpec Created
- Location: `ahv-knowledge-hub/openspec/changes/tech-blog/`
- Files: `proposal.md` + `tasks.md`
- Tasks: 35 tasks across 8 phases

### Phase 1 Agents Launched (parallel)
| Agent | Task | Status |

| 8060898 | perf: improve perceived frontend responsiveness |
| 7a02688 | perf: smooth heavy UI motion without removing effects |
| 7ad683a | fix: make notification migration dry-run read-only |
| 7779549 | feat(layout): mobile sidebar drawer + hamburger toggle |
| e03e387 | feat(responsive): round 2 hardening across all screen sizes |
| cbd1fa5 | fix(layout): resolve desktop/narrow-desktop sidebar overlap regression |
| cbe45c6 | fix(dashboard): align stat card key with BE status_detail value |
| 4e021c8 | fix: move ViDateInput import to module top level |
| ebac17c | fix: move ViDateInput import to module top level |
| d8f3dc5 | docs(openspec): add notification migration execution record |

- `initBuiltInRoles()` — handles getRoleByName throwing (role not found)
- `initSystemAdminAccount()` — handles getUsersByRoleId throwing (no users)
- `initBuiltInLessonTypes()` — handles getOneLessonTypes throwing
- `initBuiltInExamTypes()` — handles getOneLessonTypes throwing
- `initNoCodeCourses()` — handles getOneCourse throwing
- `initMotorbikeCourse()` — handles getOneCourse throwing
- **Migration enabled in app.ts**: `MigrationSample.migrationSample()` (was commented out)

### DTLX BE Running (port 5555)
- PID: 381379
- MongoDB: localhost:27017/dtlx
- 10 courses, 10 teachers, 10 sales, 10 vehicles, 10 stadiums, 7 roles seeded
- Admin: `admin` / `123456` (ID: 69e110c979143ad02e3a64b2)

- **Animation:** Framer Motion
- **Content:** MDX (local files)
- **Music:** YouTube/Spotify embed
- **Live Study:** Socket.IO on same Next.js server
- **SEO:** next-sitemap + next-seo + JSON-LD
- **Hosting:** Vercel

### Next Steps After Phase 1
- T8: senior-frontend scaffolds Next.js project
- All implementation phases follow SDLC

content.text:
Mình hiểu ý bạn rồi — cần thêm nút thu gọn/mở rộng sidebar, đặt ở vị trí giữa logo và header topbar trong admin panel.

Trước khi làm, confirm lại cho chắc:

1. **Sidebar** — bên trái màn hình, chứa các nav items (Dashboard, Bài viết, Nhạc...)
2. **Nút collapse** — đặt ở khoảng giữa logo (bên trái) và header topbar (bên phải), ngay sát mép sidebar
3. **Hành vi** — click thu gọn sidebar (chỉ còn icon) / mở rộng (hiện icon + text)

Mình sẽ:
- Tạo `components/admin/sidebar.tsx` với state collapse/expand
- Sửa `app/admin/layout.tsx` thêm sidebar + nút toggle
- Style sidebar phù hợp với thiết kế hiện tại (Tailwind, border, hover)

Đúng không?
